# Service Task Template
#
# Generated by: /ecw:workspace run (Phase 4, before dispatching child sessions)
# Location: {workspace}/{service}/.claude/ecw/workspace-task.md
# Read by: child claude session in each service directory

# Workspace Task: {SERVICE_ID}

## Requirement Context

{OVERALL_REQUIREMENT_DESCRIPTION}

This is a cross-service change managed by a workspace coordinator. You are responsible for implementing the {SERVICE_ID} portion only.

## Your Service's Scope

{PER_SERVICE_SCOPE — copied from cross-service-plan.md}

## Interface Contracts (Already Aligned)

The following contracts have been agreed upon with other services. Your implementation must match exactly.

{RELEVANT_CONTRACTS — only the ones involving this service}

## Implementation Instructions

1. Run the standard ECW implementation flow for the changes described above
2. Follow the plan generated during the analysis phase (check .claude/plans/ for existing plans)
3. If no plan exists, create one first, then implement
4. Run impl-verify after implementation
5. Ensure all tests pass

## Completion Protocol

After all implementation and verification is done, write `status.json` to the current directory:

```json
{
  "service": "{SERVICE_ID}",
  "status": "completed",
  "summary": "Brief description of what was implemented",
  "files_changed": ["list", "of", "changed", "files"],
  "commits": ["hash subject", "hash subject"],
  "error": null
}
```

If you encounter a blocker you cannot resolve:

```json
{
  "service": "{SERVICE_ID}",
  "status": "blocked",
  "summary": "Brief description of what was attempted",
  "files_changed": [],
  "commits": [],
  "error": "Description of the blocker"
}
```

## Notes

- You are working in a git worktree, not the original repository
- Commit freely — the coordinator will handle push after all services complete
- Do not push to remote — the coordinator handles batch push with user confirmation
- If you need to install a Provider's API Jar, it should already be in your local .m2 (the coordinator runs mvn install after Provider services complete)
